name: Apex Consulting
about_text: Apex Consulting is an IT consulting and managed services firm with 300 consultants across 6 US offices. Founded in 2005, we deliver digital transformation, cloud migration, and IT strategy engagements for mid-market enterprises. Our clients include manufacturers, distributors, and regional healthcare systems. We leverage Microsoft 365, SharePoint, and Salesforce as our internal platforms.
job_postings: Business Analyst — Support client engagement delivery. Gather requirements, run workshops, and document current-state processes. Salesforce experience a plus.
Project Manager — Manage delivery of IT transformation projects. Resource planning, status reporting, and client communication. PMP certification preferred.
SharePoint Developer — Build internal knowledge portals and client collaboration sites on SharePoint Online.
product_text: Apex helps mid-market companies modernize their IT. We offer strategy consulting, cloud migration, ERP implementations, and ongoing managed services. Our consultants bring deep sector expertise in manufacturing, distribution, and healthcare IT.
